title: D(alpha,alpha)D cross section measurement

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Lettere al Nuovo Cimento, Vol.27, p.265 (1980)
Rept: INFN Reports / Low Energy Physics Series, No.81/9 (1981)

x4codes.hlp: Universita di Bologna + INFN Bologna, Italy
INFN Laboratori Nazionali di Legnaro, Legnaro, Padova, Italy
INFN Laboratori Nazionali di Legnaro, Legnaro, Padova, Italy

x4freetext: Solid deuterated polystyrene targets of 20 to 50 ug/cm2
alpha-particles and the recoiling deuterons were
detected in coincidence, by means of surface barrier
Four detectors, suitably collimated, were mounted on a
rotating platform to allow measurements at different
angles simultaneously; a large area alpha-detector was
positioned, opposite with respect to the beam, on
another rotating platform, in order to detect all the
alpha-particles in coincidence with these detectors.
normalized to the value reported by L.S.Senhouse+ (see
MONIT-REF) at 150.degr (in c.m.) and E(d)=4.955 MeV
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
